untranslatable_reason: This is a position management/rollover strategy, not a price-based trading signal. The rule requires: (1) detecting rollover period active status, (2) calculating position division (total_open_position / RAP_days_remaining), (3) executing equal daily rolls. These operations are portfolio-level management functions outside the scope of indicator-based entry/exit conditions. Requires: rollover calendar state, open position tracking, RAP day counter, and automated position adjustment logic—none of which are expressible as technical indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal describes an event-driven position rebalancing strategy for futures contracts during rollover periods. This requires temporal state management, position accounting, and scheduled execution logic rather than price/technical condition evaluation. Recommend implementing as a separate portfolio management module outside the indicator-based backtest rule engine.
